---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Background, experience, and skills."
---

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download PDF](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
<!-- TODO: replace assets/cv.pdf with your real CV PDF. -->

<!-- TODO: confirm all entries below. Dates, titles, and affiliations are placeholders. -->

## Research interests
Single-cell RNA-seq analysis · AI/ML method development · biomarker & gene-panel
discovery · perturbation and disease-state modeling · reproducible pipelines.

## Education
- **Ph.D.**, _Field_, _Institution_ — _year_  <!-- TODO -->
- **B.Sc.**, _Field_, _Institution_ — _year_  <!-- TODO -->

## Experience
- **Postdoctoral Researcher**, A\*STAR Genome Institute of Singapore — _year_–present  <!-- TODO: start year -->
- _Earlier positions_  <!-- TODO -->

## Publications
- Xie Y, Yang J, Ouyang JF, Petretto E. **scPanel: a tool for automatic identification of
  sparse gene panels for generalizable patient classification using scRNA-seq datasets.**
  *Briefings in Bioinformatics* 25(6):bbae482, 2024.
  [doi:10.1093/bib/bbae482](https://doi.org/10.1093/bib/bbae482)

_Full list on the [Publications](publications.qmd) page._

## Skills
- **Single-cell:** scRNA-seq analysis, scanpy, anndata, QC/integration, differential expression
- **Machine learning / AI:** classification, feature selection, PyTorch, scikit-learn, transformers
- **Statistics & methods:** biomarker discovery, dimensionality reduction, cross-dataset generalization
- **Engineering:** reproducible pipelines, parallel computing, Python packaging, Git
- **Languages & tools:** Python, R, Jupyter, Quarto, Linux

## Software
- **[scPanel](https://github.com/carissaxie/scPanel)** — sparse gene-panel discovery for scRNA-seq (Python, open source)
